title: Login Page
desc: The TLC-HRIS sign-in screen. Employees sign in with their username and password, or with their Google work account via the "Google Account" button.

title: Dashboard
desc: Landing page after login. Shows a calendar, upcoming birthdays/anniversaries, and quick-glance widgets for the signed-in employee.

title: Employee List
desc: Master list of all employees with search/filter and an Actions menu per row for viewing, editing, and managing each record.

title: Bulk Upload Employees
desc: Modal for importing many employee records at once from an Excel (.xlsx/.xls) file, max 10MB, using the downloadable template.

title: Add Employee
desc: Employee registration form used to add a new employee: personal info, contact/address, employment details, education, and work experience.

title: Employee Profile (View)
desc: Read-only profile view of a single employee showing personal, employment, and organizational details.

title: Edit Employee
desc: Edit form for updating an existing employee record, pre-filled with the employee’s current information.

title: Department List
desc: List of departments, each with a color tag used throughout the system, with Add/Edit actions.

title: Add Department
desc: Form for creating a new department: a unique department code, name, and a color used to tag it in lists and calendars.

title: Edit Department
desc: Form for editing an existing department’s name and color code.

title: Colleges List
desc: List of colleges (academic units), each linked to a department, with Add/Edit actions.

title: Add College
desc: Form for creating a new college: a unique college code, name, and its parent department.

title: Company Positions
desc: List of job positions used across the system, with Active/Archived tabs and Add/Edit actions.

title: Add Position
desc: Form for creating a new company position/job title.

title: Leave Type Management
desc: List of configured leave types (e.g. Vacation, Sick) with their annual allocation and rules.

title: Add Leave Type
desc: Form for defining a new leave type: code, name, annual allocation, max days per request, minimum service months, negative-balance limit, and optional gender restriction.

title: Leave Credit Allocation
desc: Per-employee leave credit balances for each leave type and school year, with Add/Edit actions.

title: My Leave Requests
desc: The signed-in employee’s own leave requests and their approval status.

title: Leave Approvals (Immediate Head)
desc: Queue of pending leave requests awaiting the immediate head’s approval or rejection.

title: HR Leave Tracking
desc: HR-level view of all leave requests company-wide, with options to update, void, or override a request.

title: Leave Calendar
desc: Company-wide calendar view of approved leaves, holidays, and events.

title: My Overtime Requests
desc: The signed-in employee’s overtime requests and their approval status.

title: Overtime Approvals
desc: Queue of pending overtime requests awaiting approval by the immediate head.

title: HR Overtime Tracking
desc: HR-level view of all overtime requests with tracking and override options.

title: My CTO Requests
desc: The signed-in employee’s Compensatory Time-Off (CTO) requests and their status.

title: CTO Approvals
desc: Queue of pending CTO requests awaiting approval by the immediate head.

title: My OBT Requests
desc: The signed-in employee’s Official Business Travel (OBT) requests and their status.

title: OBT Approvals
desc: Queue of pending official business travel requests awaiting approval.

title: Holidays & Non-Working Days
desc: List of configured holidays used by the attendance and leave modules, with Add/Edit/Delete actions.

title: Add Holiday
desc: Form for adding a holiday: name, date, and type (whole day or a specific time range).

title: Delete Holiday (Confirmation)
desc: Confirmation dialog shown before a holiday is permanently deleted.

title: Cut-Off Dates
desc: Payroll cut-off periods used by attendance summaries, with Add/Edit/Delete actions.

title: Add Cut-Off Date
desc: Form for defining a new payroll cut-off period.

title: Employee Daily Attendance
desc: Daily time-in/time-out log for all employees, sourced from the biometric/attendance device.

title: User Accounts
desc: List of system user accounts linked to employees, with account status and Edit action.

title: Edit User Account
desc: Form for changing a user’s role (user type), active status, or resetting their password.

title: User Types & Privileges
desc: List of roles (user types) with Create/Edit/Delete actions and per-role privilege assignment.

title: Create User Type
desc: Form for creating a new role and selecting which system privileges it grants.

title: Edit Permissions
desc: Modal for changing which privileges are assigned to an existing role.

title: My Profile
desc: The signed-in user’s own profile and account settings, including changing their password.

title: Notifications
desc: In-app notification center for approvals, requests, and system alerts.

title: Faculty List
desc: List of teaching staff with their teaching load, editable via the Actions menu.

title: System Logs
desc: Audit trail of user actions across the system for accountability and troubleshooting.
